inputs.label: Shipping Distance
inputs.businessContext: The total distance the freight will travel from origin to destination.

inputs.label: Shipment Weight
inputs.businessContext: Total weight of the goods being shipped.

inputs.label: Fuel Cost per Liter
inputs.businessContext: Current cost of diesel or fuel per liter.

inputs.label: Fuel Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Average kilometers the transport vehicle travels per liter of fuel.

inputs.label: Handling Rate per Kg
inputs.businessContext: Cost of handling, loading, and unloading per kilogram.

inputs.label: Additional Charges
inputs.businessContext: Any tolls, surcharges, or fixed costs not included elsewhere.
